title: pentacalia neblinensis
intro: Pentacalia neblinensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Neblina pentacalia or the Cloud pentacalia, native to the Peruvian Andes. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Pentacalia neblinensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against bacterial and fungal infections. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
